title: Use Case 1: Basic Report Generation
summary: Generate a structured report from distributed source fragments with deterministic local execution and no translation.

title: Use Case 2: AI-Preferred Report Generation
summary: The same distributed French report goal resolves through the AI summarizer when local-only constraints are lifted and higher-quality summarization is allowed.

title: Use Case 3: French Output with Translation
summary: Generate a structured report in French from distributed source fragments, inserting translation dynamically because the goal requires it.

title: Use Case 4: Capability Unavailable, Runtime Adapts
summary: The translator is unavailable, so the runtime degrades gracefully and produces a structured English report while making the limitation explicit.

title: Use Case 5: Agent Proposes, Runtime Validates
summary: The agent proposes the AI summarizer for a French report, but the runtime rejects it under local-only constraints and selects the deterministic path instead.
